name: Crypto Gas Fee Reimbursed Job
description: A job offer requiring the developer to deploy a smart contract on Mainnet using their own wallet/gas fee, with a promise of immediate reimbursement and a massive bonus, but it harvests fees or credentials.

conversation.speaker: buyer
conversation.message: Hi, I need a developer to deploy our smart contract to Ethereum Mainnet today. The contract is already compiled and tested.

conversation.speaker: seller
conversation.message: Sure, I can help with that. Could you share the ABI and source code?

conversation.speaker: buyer
conversation.message: Yes, I will send the files. But because our company treasury wallet has a 24h multisig lock, you will need to pay the deployment gas fees from your personal wallet. We will reimburse you the gas costs plus a $5,000 bonus as soon as the transaction is confirmed. Can you do it now?

conversation.speaker: seller
conversation.message: I prefer not to use my personal funds for gas fees. Can you wait until the multisig lock is lifted or fund the deployment address directly?

conversation.speaker: buyer
conversation.message: No, this is extremely urgent! The launch is in 1 hour. If you don't do it now, we will hire someone else. Just fund it and send us the tx hash, we pay you immediately.

red_flags: Requesting personal funds for business transaction
